name: Maintainability index follows community conventions
description: The maintainability index (i.e., degree of effectiveness and efficiency with which a product or system can be modified by the intended maintainers) should follow conventions and standards established by the community responsible for maintaining the source code or system.

source.name: Task Force Sub Group 3 - Review of Software Quality Attributes and Characteristics
Socially-Informed Jupyter Notebook Quality: A Role- and Lifecycle-Aware Metrics Framework
